title: Matera to join the FedNow Request for Payments Work Group
excerpt: Matera was announced as a participant in the Federal Reserve's Request for Payment (RFP) Work Group to establish industry considerations.
body: Matera was announced as a participant in the Federal Reserve's Request for Payment (RFP) Work Group to establish industry considerations for a consistent end-customer experience related to RFP capabilities offered by the FedNow Service.
